events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a CSST gas line not bonded on a commercial electrical project at rough-complete stage. NEC 250.104 requires bonding of metal piping systems. This is a defect.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "CSST gas line is not bonded to the electrical grounding/bonding system",
    "Missing bonding conductor/connection on CSST piping, creating potential for arcing and lightning/induced current hazard"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved bonding jumper per NEC 250.104 between CSST gas piping and grounding electrode system",
    "Verify bonding conductor sizing and connection method comply with manufacturer instructions and NEC 250.30 where applicable",
    "Request re-inspection after corrective bonding is installed"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.104 requires metal gas piping, including CSST, to be bonded to the grounding electrode system. At rough-complete stage, an unbonded CSST line is a non-compliant, installed-defective condition with significant fire/arcing risk.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.104", "NEC 250.30"]
}
